LAW AND MOTION 301, MR. RESNER INFORMED THE COURT THAT AN ORDER WAS SIGNED BY JUDGE BALLATI ON JANUARY 6, 2009 STRIKING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE THE DEFAULT FOR FAILURE TO PAY FEES. THE ORDER ALSO SPECIFIED THAT ALL PAPERS FILED BY DEFENDANT AFTER THAT IS STRICKEN. DEFENDANT FRANCES AYON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT FRANCES AYON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED WITH OUT PREJUDICE. FRANCES AYON HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (D206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT AYON, FRANCES

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ROBERT D. RESNER, TEL. NO. 482-9500 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PAUL BEHREND, TEL. NO. 956-0549 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - ATTY. RESNER INFORMED THE COURT THAT AN ORDER WAS SIGNED BY JUDGE BALLATI ON JANUARY 6 STRIKING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE THE DEFAULT FOR FAILURE TO PAY FEES. THE ORDER ALSO SPECIFIED THAT ALL PAPERS FILED BY DEFENDANT AFTER THAT IS STRICKEN. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWED. DEFENDANT FRANCES AYON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Execution
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ANTHONY HARRIS, TEL. NO. (510) 827-8676 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JESSICA ALEXANDRA OF THE LAW OFFICES OF BEHREND, MORRISON & ALEXANDRA, TEL. NO. 956-0549 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY FRANCES AYON.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT FRANCES AYON'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Execution IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB)

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Dec-24-2008 Denied
